    jenzabar.userSettings = {
        culture:    'en-US',
        language:   'en',
        dateFormat: 'm/d/yy'
    };
    window.userSettings = jenzabar.userSettings;

    jenzabar.jicsVersion = {
        text: {
	        version: '?v=' + '2023.2 Patch_8'
        }
    }
    jenzabar.siteSettings = {
        textEditorSettings: {
            customAudioMinutesLimit: 5,
            customVideoMinutesLimit: 5
        },
        text: {
            more: 'More'
        }
    };
</script>
